title: Eger, Heves — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Eger, Heves: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Eger is a city in Heves with a population of 52,898. A beautiful Baroque city in northern Hungary, famous for its castle’s heroic defense against the Ottomans, the Valley of the Beautiful Women wine region, and thermal baths.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
